pr.title: Record: 0.0498 bpb - Packed Training N-gram Artifact + Learned Weighting Gate (updated)

output.summary: Learned gate mixes neural model with order-2..9 n-gram experts while evaluation begins from a packed training cache embedded in the artifact.
techniques: Learned gate blending neural logits with order-2..9 n-gram experts
Packed 32K-bucket training cache serialized into the artifact for warm eval start
Context-only gating with score-first single-pass evaluation and cached GPTQ calibration
